chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No. S – 407 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 05.06.2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with Applicant Chaudhry Shahid Hussain Rajput, Advocate for the proposed accused Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State along with SIP Abdul Waheed, SHO Police Station, Ubauro >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Reports have been filed by SHO Police Station, Ubauro, whereas, documents have also been filed by the learned counsel for the proposed accused as well as applicant, which are taken on record. The primary grievance seems to be that there is a dispute over ownership / possession of a plot of land. Learned counsel for the proposed accused submits that the police has used intimidatory tactics and under the garb of an order of this Court, have forcefully evicted people from their land. As a consequence, both the parties are willing to fight with each other. SSP, Ghotki as well as SHO Police Station, Ubauro, are directed that they should not become party to any dispute between the private parties, act in accordance with law and not to interpret any order of this Court to mean that any party should be intimidated and threatened. The issue is about alleged illegal occupation and the parties should approach the relevant forum for redressal of their grievance. Both the learned counsel of the parties as well as learned Additional PG are satisfied, hence the Crl: Miscellaneous Application is disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
